description: Application avoids invoking shell commands with user-controlled input. Uses direct process execution (subprocess with list args, no shell=True) or purpose-built libraries instead of shell pipelines. When shell interaction is unavoidable, uses strict allowlist validation on inputs.

cvss_vector_impacts.rationale: Shell metacharacters in user input have no effect; arguments passed as array not string
Cannot execute arbitrary system commands via injection
Application cannot be leveraged to run commands on the host OS

verification.method: Verify no shell=True with user-controlled input; no os.system() or os.popen() calls

commands.expected: No shell invocations with user-controlled input
